spec_match.rationale: The child document is now served with Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1 and the parent no longer masks native support with an unconditional height polyfill.

interactive.rationale: Provides a live slider that updates blocks in the embedded child document.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The explanation now matches the actual server-backed responsive iframe behavior.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows native support, verifies the header, and applies the postMessage fallback only when native responsive sizing is absent.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the showcase design system styling.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The server header and conditional fallback issues are fixed, so supporting browsers can exercise the native path while older browsers get a labeled fallback.
